explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.findings: Reports reference policy considerations for potential bias in AI outputs.
fairness.path_to_improvement: Publish bias testing results, outcome monitoring, or vendor fairness certifications.

relevant_sources.summary: This SEC filing, Diamondback Energy's 2025 Annual Report, provides evidence for the **governance** and **privacy** pillars of responsible AI. The report discusses risks associated with AI development and deployment, implying a need for governance and controls to manage these advancements. Furthermore, it identifies risks related to the privacy of confidential information and potential bias in AI outputs, indicating policy considerations for these areas.
relevant_sources.title: Form 10-K Annual Report 2025

governance.findings: Reports discuss risks associated with AI development and deployment, referencing a need for governance and controls to manage these advancements. They also discuss potential risks posed by AI advancements in cybersecurity and outline planned responses, including policies, procedures, and engaging third parties, demonstrating a focus on established governance structures.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This SEC filing, Diamondback Energy's 2025 Annual Report, provides evidence for the **governance** and **privacy** pillars of responsible AI. The report discusses risks associated with AI development and deployment, implying a need for governance and controls to manage these advancements. Furthermore, it identifies risks related to the privacy of confidential information and potential bias in AI outputs, indicating policy considerations for these areas.
relevant_sources.title: Form 10-K Annual Report 2025

relevant_sources.summary: This SEC filing, the "Form 10-K Annual Report 2024," provides evidence for the **governance** pillar of responsible AI. The report discusses the potential risks posed by AI advancements in cybersecurity and outlines planned responses, such as implementing policies, procedures, and engaging third parties to mitigate these risks, demonstrating a focus on established governance structures.
relevant_sources.title: Form 10-K Annual Report 2024

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.findings: Reports reference policy considerations for the privacy of confidential information.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

relevant_sources.summary: This SEC filing, Diamondback Energy's 2025 Annual Report, provides evidence for the **governance** and **privacy** pillars of responsible AI. The report discusses risks associated with AI development and deployment, implying a need for governance and controls to manage these advancements. Furthermore, it identifies risks related to the privacy of confidential information and potential bias in AI outputs, indicating policy considerations for these areas.
relevant_sources.title: Form 10-K Annual Report 2025

transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

summary.overall_findings: Drawing from 7 publicly available sources, Diamondback Energy's published materials address 3 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. These pillars include fairness, privacy, and governance, all addressed at the policy level; for instance, reports reference policy considerations for potential bias in AI outputs. Privacy materials reference policy considerations for the privacy of confidential information, and governance disclosures discuss risks associated with AI development and deployment, referencing a need for controls to manage AI advancements. No qualifying public evidence was found for transparency, explainability, and 2 additional pillars.
